title: DOOM: Behind the Music
creator: Mick Gordon
description: Composer Mick Gordon presents the instruments, signal chains, experiments, and constraints behind DOOM's reactive score.
useful: Shows how a strong musical identity can emerge from technical process rather than genre references alone.
audience: Composers, sound designers, and creative directors developing a distinctive audio identity.
learning: Turn creative constraints into an audio process
Build timbres through recording and signal processing
Connect an adaptive score to the pace of play
